content.text: Good, the project directory exists. Let me create all necessary subdirectories first, then write all the files.
Now I'll create all 10 files in parallel.

input.content:
# Supabase
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=your_supabase_url
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=your_supabase_anon_key
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=your_service_role_key

# Stripe
STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_xxx
STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET=whsec_xxx
NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=pk_test_xxx

# OpenAI
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-xxx

# App
NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=http://localhost:3000
NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_NAME=NexusAI

# Resend (optional)
RESEND_API_KEY=re_xxx

import { PlanConfig } from '@/types';

export const APP_NAME = 'NexusAI';
export const APP_DESCRIPTION = 'AI-powered document processing & feedback analysis platform';

export const PLANS: Record<string, PlanConfig> = {
  free: {
    name: 'Free',
    price: 0,
    yearlyPrice: 0,
    description: 'Perfect for getting started',
    stripe_price_id_monthly: null,
    stripe_price_id_yearly: null,
    limits: {
      documents_per_month: 10,
      surveys: 5,
      analyses_per_month: 5,
      team_members: 1,
      custom_templates: 3,
      export_formats: ['csv'],
      api_access: false,
    },
    features: [
      '10 documents/month',
      '5 surveys',
      '5 AI analyses/month',
      'CSV export',
      'Basic templates',
    ],
  },
  pro: {
    name: 'Pro',
    price: 29,
    yearlyPrice: 278,
    description: 'For growing teams',
    stripe_price_id_monthly: process.env.STRIPE_PRO_MONTHLY_PRICE_ID || '',
    stripe_price_id_yearly: process.env.STRIPE_PRO_YEARLY_PRICE_ID || '',
    popular: true,
    limits: {
      documents_per_month: 200,
      surveys: 50,
      analyses_per_month: 100,
      team_members: 5,
      custom_templates: 20,
      export_formats: ['csv', 'excel', 'json'],
      api_access: true,
    },
    features: [
      '200 documents/month',
      '50 surveys',
      '100 AI analyses/month',
      'CSV, Excel & JSON export',
      '20 custom templates',
      'API access',
      '5 team members',
    ],
  },
  enterprise: {
    name: 'Enterprise',
    price: 99,
    yearlyPrice: 950,
    description: 'For large organizations',
    stripe_price_id_monthly: process.env.STRIPE_ENTERPRISE_MONTHLY_PRICE_ID || '',
    stripe_price_id_yearly: process.env.STRIPE_ENTERPRISE_YEARLY_PRICE_ID || '',
    limits: {
      documents_per_month: Infinity,
      surveys: Infinity,
      analyses_per_month: Infinity,
      team_members: 25,
      custom_templates: Infinity,
      export_formats: ['csv', 'excel', 'json', 'api'],
      api_access: true,
    },
    features: [
      'Unlimited documents',
      'Unlimited surveys',
      'Unlimited AI analyses',
      'All export formats + API',
      'Unlimited custom templates',
      'Priority support',
      '25 team members',
    ],
  },
};

export const ACCEPTED_FILE_TYPES = {
  'application/pdf': ['.pdf'],
  'image/png': ['.png'],
  'image/jpeg': ['.jpg', '.jpeg'],
  'image/tiff': ['.tiff', '.tif'],
  'image/webp': ['.webp'],
};

export const MAX_FILE_SIZE = {
  free: 5 * 1024 * 1024, // 5MB
  pro: 25 * 1024 * 1024, // 25MB
  enterprise: 50 * 1024 * 1024, // 50MB
};

export const QUESTION_TYPES = [
  { value: 'open_ended', label: 'Open Ended', description: 'Free text response' },
  { value: 'multiple_choice', label: 'Multiple Choice', description: 'Select multiple options' },
  { value: 'single_choice', label: 'Single Choice', description: 'Select one option' },
  { value: 'rating', label: 'Rating', description: 'Rate on a scale (1-5)' },
  { value: 'nps', label: 'NPS', description: 'Net Promoter Score (0-10)' },
  { value: 'yes_no', label: 'Yes / No', description: 'Binary choice' },
] as const;

export const TEMPLATE_CATEGORIES = [
  { value: 'invoice', label: 'Invoice' },
  { value: 'contract', label: 'Contract' },
  { value: 'receipt', label: 'Receipt' },
  { value: 'custom', label: 'Custom' },
] as const;

content.text:
All 10 files have been created successfully. Here is a summary of what was created:

**Files created (10 total):**

1. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\.env.local.example`** -- Environment variables template with placeholders for Supabase, Stripe, OpenAI, App URL, and Resend credentials.

2. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\types\index.ts`** -- All shared TypeScript types including `Profile`, `Organization`, `OrganizationMember`, `Document`, `ExtractedField`, `ExtractionTemplate`, `TemplateField`, `Survey`, `SurveyQuestion`, `SurveySettings`, `SurveyResponse`, `Analysis`, `AnalysisResults`, `AnalysisTheme`, `ApiKey`, `ActivityLog`, `ApiResponse`, `PaginatedResponse`, `PlanTier`, `PlanLimits`, and `PlanConfig`.

3. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\lib\constants.ts`** -- Application constants including `APP_NAME`, `APP_DESCRIPTION`, `PLANS` (free/pro/enterprise with limits and features), `ACCEPTED_FILE_TYPES`, `MAX_FILE_SIZE` per plan tier, `QUESTION_TYPES`, and `TEMPLATE_CATEGORIES`.

4. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\lib\supabase\client.ts`** -- Browser-side Supabase client using `createBrowserClient` from `@supabase/ssr`.

5. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\lib\supabase\server.ts`** -- Server-side Supabase client using `createServerClient` with Next.js cookie handling via `next/headers`.

6. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\lib\supabase\middleware.ts`** -- Supabase middleware helper (`updateSession`) that handles session refresh, protects `/dashboard` routes for unauthenticated users, and redirects authenticated users away from `/login` and `/signup`.

7. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\lib\openai.ts`** -- OpenAI client instance and two helper functions: `extractFromDocument` (GPT-4o vision-based document data extraction) and `analyzeFeedback` (survey response analysis with themes/sentiment/summary/full modes).

8. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\lib\stripe.ts`** -- Stripe client instance and two helper functions: `createCheckoutSession` (subscription checkout with organization metadata) and `createBillingPortalSession` (customer billing portal).

9. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\hooks\use-user.ts`** -- React hook (`useUser`) that manages user authentication state and profile data, with real-time auth state change listener via Supabase.

10. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\hooks\use-subscription.ts`** -- React hook (`useSubscription`) that fetches organization data and computes plan limits, document upload eligibility, and survey creation eligibility based on usage quotas.
